mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyhAlarmSendHist :: selectById */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM syh_alarm_send_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id WHERE h.send_hist_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.sy :: SyhAlarmSendHist :: selectPageCount */ FROM syh_alarm_send_hist h
